# remnawave_config_profiles (Data Source)

Lists all Remnawave config profiles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_config_profiles" "all" {}

output "profiles" {
  value = data.remnawave_config_profiles.all.config_profiles
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
